title: PayeeAlias
description: An external-system reference mapped to a canonical Payee. Allows partner systems to reference a payee by their own identifier without knowing the CDP payee ID. Uniqueness is scoped to external_system + external_ref.

payee_id.description: The canonical payee this alias points to.

external_system.description: Identifier for the external system (e.g. partner_portal, erp_system).

external_ref.description: The reference in the external system. Combined with external_system, must be unique per account.
